hero.description: A lightweight, open-source Chrome extension that brings Spotlight-style search to your browser. Fast, private, and completely free.

core_features.title: Why MiaoMint?
core_features.hybrid_desc: Search across your open tabs, bookmarks, and browsing history simultaneously. Intelligent deduplication and smart ranking.
core_features.keyboard_desc: Designed for keyboard warriors. Stay in flow without touching the mouse. All essential actions are just a keystroke away.
core_features.privacy_desc: All data processed locally. No servers, no tracking, no data collection. Your browsing data stays on your device.

shortcuts.title: Designed for Speed
shortcuts.subtitle: Master your browser with keyboard shortcuts. No mouse required.

opensource.title: Fully Open Source
opensource.subtitle: Transparency, freedom, and community-driven development
opensource.mit_desc: Free to use, modify, and distribute. No restrictions, no hidden fees.
opensource.transparent_desc: See exactly how your data is processed. No black boxes, no surprises.
opensource.community_desc: Contributions welcome. Help shape the future of MiaoMint.
opensource.free_desc: No premium tiers, no feature gates. Everything is available to everyone.
opensource.join_desc: Star the repo, report issues, or contribute code.

features.title: Deep Dive Preview
features.subtitle: See MiaoMint in action with these interactive previews.
features.unified_desc: One input for tabs, bookmarks, history, URL navigation, and web search fallback.
features.keyboard_desc: Opt/Alt + M to open, ↑/↓ to navigate, Enter to open, Esc to close.
features.command_desc: Use /b for bookmarks, /h for history, and /setting to open preferences.
features.polished_desc: Themes, opacity control, and multilingual UI with instant updates.
features.privacy_desc: No backend. Your data stays on-device, only used to power search and navigation.

cta.title: Ready to speed up your workflow?
cta.desc: Join users who have stopped digging through tabs and started finding them instantly.
cta.footer: Open Source • Local Data • No Tracking

meta.title: MiaoMint — Command Palette for Chrome Tabs, Bookmarks & History

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro_text: MiaoMint ("we," "our," or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how our Chrome Extension ("MiaoMint") handles your data.
privacy.core_principle: Core Principle: We believe your browsing data belongs to you. MiaoMint is designed to operate locally on your device. We do not collect, store, or transmit your personal data to any external servers.
privacy.tab_info_text: MiaoMint accesses your open tabs' titles and URLs solely to provide the search and navigation functionality. This processing happens entirely within your browser's memory.
privacy.bookmark_info_text: When you use bookmark search (e.g. bookmark mode), MiaoMint reads your browser bookmarks' titles and URLs to provide local search and open-bookmark functionality. Bookmark data is processed locally in your browser and is not transmitted to us.
privacy.history_info_text: When you use history search (e.g. history mode), MiaoMint searches your browsing history to provide local search and open-history functionality. History data is processed locally in your browser and is not transmitted to us.
privacy.search_queries_text: If you choose to run a web search from MiaoMint, your query is passed to your browser's built-in search feature (e.g. `chrome.search.query`) and will be handled by your default search engine according to its own privacy policy. We do not receive or store your search queries.
privacy.user_settings_text: Your preferences (theme, opacity, etc.) are stored using `chrome.storage.sync`. If you have Chrome Sync enabled, these settings may be synchronized across your signed-in Chrome devices by Google as part of the browser's sync feature. You can control this behavior in your browser sync settings.
privacy.keyboard_interactions_text: MiaoMint uses keyboard events to support the command shortcut and in-UI navigation (e.g. Escape, Arrow keys, Enter). These events are not recorded, stored, or sent to us.
privacy.no_remote_collection_text: We do not have any backend servers. We do not use Google Analytics or any third-party tracking scripts within the extension. Your tab and bookmark data is processed locally in your browser and is not transmitted to us.

permissions.all_urls: Read and change all your data on the websites you visit (``): This permission is technically required to inject the MiaoMint search bar (Spotlight-like UI) into every page you visit so you can invoke it with a shortcut. We do not read page content other than to display the search bar.
permissions.tabs: Tabs: Required to list your currently open tabs (title, URL) so you can search and switch between them.
permissions.bookmarks: Bookmarks: Required to list your browser bookmarks (title, URL) so you can search and open them.
permissions.history: History: Required to search your browser history (title, URL) so you can find and open visited pages.
permissions.storage: Storage: Required to save your preferences (theme, opacity, language).
permissions.search: Search: Required to trigger a web search using your browser's default search engine when you choose to do so.
permissions.active_tab: Active Tab: Required to interact with the currently active tab when you invoke the extension (e.g. showing the UI and opening a selected result).

privacy.your_rights_text: Since we do not collect your data, there is no data for us to delete or export upon request. You have full control over the local data stored by the extension:

your_rights_list.item1: You can uninstall the extension to immediately remove all associated local data.
your_rights_list.item2: If you have Chrome Sync enabled, you can disable sync or clear synced data via your browser sync settings.

privacy.changes_text: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. If we make significant changes, we will notify you by updating the date at the top of this policy and, where appropriate, through the extension.
privacy.contact_text: If you have questions about this policy, please contact us via the Chrome Web Store support tab.
